details: Isite@2026.7.2 is a trojanized version of a legitimate Node.js web framework. When required, the package POSTs its full configuration (including security keys, MongoDB connection details, session secrets, and proxy settings) to social-browser[.]com/api/core-trusted-data. The C2 server can respond with a "delete" command that triggers recursive deletion of the filesystem. The implant uses a custom obfuscation scheme (base64→number-pair encoding) to hide the C2 URL and activation logic, and is time-gated via encoded date values. The exfiltration uses HTTP POST with User-Agent "eval" to social-browser[.]com on port 80.
